capabilities: Ensure that secrets are securely stored, accessed, and rotated within AI-prompting applications to prevent unauthorized access and data breaches.

procedure.action: Compose HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager to securely store API keys and credentials by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Initialize environment variables to access secrets, ensuring they are not hardcoded in the application by loading environment-specific values from config file; assert all required keys are present via config_validate(); assert config_validation_error_count < 1.

Set up automated secret rotation every 30 days using cloud provider tools or custom scripts using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Invoke access controls using IAM roles to restrict secret access to authorized services only.

Log access attempts and anomalies using structured logging for audit and compliance purposes using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Implement secure secrets management in AI-prompting applications by integrating domain-specific constraints and examples to ensure confidentiality and integrity.
title: Secrets Management in AI-Prompting Applications

failureConditions: Secrets are hardcoded, leading to potential leaks.
Unauthorized access due to improper access controls.

Secrets are not rotated, increasing exposure risk; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
all required keys are present via config_validate()
successConditions: Check that no secrets are present in the codebase using static analysis tools; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify secret access logs for unauthorized attempts; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure secret rotation logs show successful updates every 30 days; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
